markets.question: Total Kills Over/Under 33.5 in Game 1?
markets.description:
In the upcoming match between FURIA Esports and RED Canids in the CBLOL Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 2 at 1:50PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 34 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: RED Canids Kalunga tops the CBLOL Split 2 regular season standings at 6-0, fueling trader consensus with their dominant form and undefeated streak, including a 3-1 BO5 victory over FURIA in the recent CBLOL Cup. FURIA sits tied for second at 4-2 but shows inconsistency, dropping a map to paiN Gaming and suffering a heavy defeat to Fluxo in recent weeks after stronger showings against Keyd Stars and Leviatán. Head-to-head history favors RED Canids (14-11 series lead), with stylistic edges in macro play and teamfights. This BO3 matchup carries playoff implications, as both vie for top seeding amid a tight race; no major roster changes or patch shifts noted.

markets.question: Spread: AS Nancy-Lorraine (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 2 game, scheduled for May 2 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "AS Nancy-Lorraine" if AS Nancy-Lorraine win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Pau FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue2.fr. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Pau FC vs. AS Nancy-Lorraine - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Ligue 2 game, scheduled for May 2 at 2:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Pau FC hosts AS Nancy-Lorraine in Ligue 2 at Nouste Camp on May 2, hosting a side sitting 9th in the table against 15th-placed Nancy amid a tight mid-to-lower standings battle. Their earlier season encounter ended 2-2 at Nancy, reflecting a competitive head-to-head record with two Pau wins, one Nancy victory, and two draws in the last five meetings. Nancy remains winless in their past five league outings and struggles away, scoring sparingly, while Pau boasts solid home form averaging 1.2 goals per game. Key absences include Nancy goalkeeper Martin Sourzac sidelined by arm injury and Pau's Walid Bouabdeli facing yellow-card suspension, potentially tilting trader sentiment toward home advantage and recent momentum as promotion and relegation pressures mount.

events.title: Moreirense FC vs. CF Estrela da Amadora - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Primeira Liga game, scheduled for May 2 at 10:30 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Moreirense hold a solid seventh place in the Primeira Liga standings with 39 points from 30 matches, bolstered by a recent 1-0 home win over Estoril that ended a three-game skid, showcasing defensive resilience at Parque de Jogos Comendador Joaquim de Almeida Freitas. Estrela da Amadora languish in 15th, fighting relegation with a poor away record, following their goalless draw against Moreirense in December. Head-to-head favors Moreirense overall (5 wins in 10), though recent meetings are tight. Minor injuries sideline Moreirense's Vasco Sousa (long-term fibula) and Estrela's Jefferson Encada (muscle since March), but full squads expected; late-season stakes heighten Estrela's motivation amid table pressures and home/away splits.

markets.question: Game 1: Both Teams Destroy Inhibitors?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 1. In League of Legends, each team has three inhibitors (one in each lane), located behind the inner turrets.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Team WE and JD Gaming each destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) do not destroy any enemy inhibitors.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams destroyed at least one inhibitor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: Team WE enters this LPL Group Ascend BO3 rematch at the bottom of standings with a winless 0-9 series record and 1-18 games differential, extending a nine-series skid that includes a 0-2 loss to JD Gaming just one week prior on April 25. JD Gaming, holding a strong 6-3 mark and game differential of +5, rides momentum from five straight series wins, bolstering their top-four playoff push in the double round-robin format. Historical head-to-head favors JDG 20-7 over 27 meetings, with no reported roster changes, injuries, or substitutes under patch 26.7; expect emphasis on JDG's macro execution and carries like HongQ against WE's struggling teamfights and objective control.

markets.question: Game 1: Any Player Quadra Kill?
markets.description:
This market is about whether any player achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. In League of Legends, a Quadra Kill occurs when a single player kills 4 enemy champions in rapid succession.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if any player on either team achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if no player achieves a Quadra Kill. A Penta Kill (5 kills in rapid succession) also counts as a Quadra Kill having occurred for the purposes of this market.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Team Vitality and SK Gaming in the LEC Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 2 at 1:15PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Vitality" if Team Vitality win the match against SK Gaming.

This market will resolve to "SK Gaming" if SK Gaming win the match against Team Vitality.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Team Vitality enters this LEC Spring regular season BO3 series as the league's hottest squad, riding a six-match win streak that clinched the first playoff spot after decisive victories over G2 Esports and Movistar KOI in recent weeks. Currently atop the standings at 6-1 in series with a dominant 13-5 map record, VIT's cohesive roster excels in the current patch meta, leveraging strong macro play and objective control. SK Gaming, mired at 2-6 with a poor 6-12 map differential, has struggled with inconsistent drafting and early-game execution, losing prior head-to-heads to VIT in LEC Versus. No major roster changes or substitutions reported, though SK's urgency for points could spur an upset bid in this late-season matchup.

markets.question: Game 1: Both Teams Slay a Dragon?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 1. In League of Legends, elemental dragons (Infernal, Mountain, Ocean, Hextech, Chemtech, and Cloud) spawn in the dragon pit starting at 5:00 game time. After being slain, the next dragon spawns 5 minutes later. Once a team claims the Dragon Soul (by slaying four dragons), all subsequent dragon spawns become Elder Dragons.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Team Vitality and SK Gaming each slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay any elemental dragon during Game 1. Only elemental dragons count toward this market — Elder Dragon kills do not count.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams had slain at least one elemental dragon prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Game 1: Any Player Quadra Kill?
markets.description:
This market is about whether any player achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. In League of Legends, a Quadra Kill occurs when a single player kills 4 enemy champions in rapid succession.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: In CBLOL 2026 Split 1 regular season Week 6, bottom-table clash pits struggling Leviatán (1-6 series record) against winless paiN Gaming (0-6), with both desperate for points to climb standings and secure playoff hopes. Leviatán's latest 0-2 loss to Vivo Keyd Stars on April 26 exposed macro inconsistencies from import-heavy roster (Devost top, Booki jungle, Enga mid, Snaker bot), while paiN's 1-2 defeat to FURIA last week highlighted top/mid weaknesses despite CarioK support anchoring. paiN holds head-to-head edge (4-2 series wins, including multiple CBLOL Cup victories in February), but Patch 26.9 meta shifts toward aggressive junglers could favor Leviatán's Booki if early game executes. Home crowd neutral; expect volatile BO3 with upset potential amid teams' streaks.

markets.question: Game 1: Both Teams Destroy Inhibitors?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 1. In League of Legends, each team has three inhibitors (one in each lane), located behind the inner turrets.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both FURIA Esports and RED Canids each destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) do not destroy any enemy inhibitors.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams destroyed at least one inhibitor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Game 1: Any Player Quadra Kill?
markets.description:
This market is about whether any player achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. In League of Legends, a Quadra Kill occurs when a single player kills 4 enemy champions in rapid succession.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if any player on either team achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if no player achieves a Quadra Kill. A Penta Kill (5 kills in rapid succession) also counts as a Quadra Kill having occurred for the purposes of this market.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether a Quadra Kill occurred prior to stoppage. If no Quadra Kill occurred, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Game 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Game 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Game 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all champion kills recorded during the match by both FURIA Esports and RED Canids. Executions (deaths to non-champion sources such as turrets, minions, or neutral monsters where no enemy champion receives kill credit) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Game 1, or if Game 1 is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: In CBLOL 2026 Split 1 regular season Week 6, bottom-table clash pits struggling Leviatán (1-6 series record) against winless paiN Gaming (0-6), with both desperate for points to climb standings and secure playoff hopes. Leviatán's latest 0-2 loss to Vivo Keyd Stars on April 26 exposed macro inconsistencies from import-heavy roster (Devost top, Booki jungle, Enga mid, Snaker bot), while paiN's 1-2 defeat to FURIA last week highlighted top/mid weaknesses despite CarioK support anchoring. paiN holds head-to-head edge (4-2 series wins, including multiple CBLOL Cup victories in February), but Patch 26.9 meta shifts toward aggressive junglers could favor Leviatán's Booki if early game executes. Home crowd neutral; expect volatile BO3 with upset potential amid teams' streaks.

markets.question: Tyrese Maxey: Points O/U 23.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for May 2 at 12:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Tyrese Maxey scores more than 23.5 points during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Tyrese Maxey scores 23.5 points or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Boston Celtics host the Philadelphia 76ers in a winner-take-all Game 7 of their Eastern Conference first-round playoff series at TD Garden, with the series tied 3-3 after Philly's gritty 106-93 Game 6 victory on Thursday. The 76ers' stifling defense has held Boston under 100 points in the last two games, fueled by Joel Embiid's probable status and Tyrese Maxey's scoring surges, signaling a peaking Sixers squad amid back-to-back wins. However, trader consensus favors the Celtics' home-court advantage, depth from a healthy Jayson Tatum (cleared after calf concerns), and Jaylen Brown's playoff prowess, despite recent offensive struggles. Rest advantages even out, but Boston's regular-season dominance over Philly underscores the high-stakes rivalry tension.

eventMetadata.context_description: Apple's 92% market-implied probability of remaining the world's third-largest company by market capitalization at May 31 reflects trader consensus on its entrenched $4.11 trillion valuation, a commanding $1.03 trillion lead over fourth-ranked Microsoft ($3.08 trillion) and comfortable separation from distant challengers like Amazon ($2.88 trillion). This positioning solidified with Apple's outsized 3.24% 24-hour gain—outpacing Alphabet's 0.34% and NVIDIA's 0.56%—amid stable hierarchy where NVIDIA ($4.82 trillion) and Alphabet ($4.64 trillion) hold the top two spots. Microsoft's year-to-date 15% market cap erosion further dims overtake prospects. Realistic challenges include a volatility spike dropping Alphabet below Apple (priced at 6% odds) or NVIDIA's improbable tumble past the $700 billion gap, with resolution looming in under 30 days.

markets.question: Will Anthropic’s market cap be between 0.9T and 1.2T at market close on IPO day by December 31 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Anthropic's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by December 31, 2027".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on Anthropic’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

markets.question: Will "Bully - Ye" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

markets.question: Map 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 2, or if Map 2 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Imperial Academy vs Infinite (BO3) - United21 Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket quarterfinal 1 match between Imperial Academy and Infinite in the United21 Playoffs, initially scheduled for April 9 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Imperial Academy" if Imperial Academy win the match against Infinite.

This market will resolve to "Infinite" if Infinite win the match against Imperial Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Imperial Academy entered the United21 Season 47 playoffs upper bracket quarterfinal BO3 against Infinite as Group A winners with a perfect 2-0 record, posting a dominant +16 map differential via close 2-1 win over LPH Gaming and 2-0 rout of Sangal ALTERS. Infinite scraped through Group D as runners-up (2-1 overall, -9 differential), rebounding with a decider 2-1 over AaB esport after a 0-2 group loss to Misa, relying on stand-ins like fnl and SHiPZ. No head-to-head history; both academy squads boast stable rosters—Imperial's ta9z, sh1Fu, Kragh trio driving momentum—shaping trader consensus around Imperial's superior form in the European online circuit ahead of the April 9 clash.

Damac's recent 1-1 home draw versus Al Qadsiah underscores defensive solidity despite poor away form, while Al Khaleej has endured a mix of losses and draws lately. Head-to-head records show competitiveness, with Al Khaleej holding a slight edge in recent encounters; no major injuries reported, though final team news and Abha's elevation could favor the hosts' acclimatization.

markets.question: Will Bitcoin reach $1,000,000 by December 31, 2026?

markets.question: Will Hibernian FC win on 2026-05-03?
markets.description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for May 3, 2026
If Hibernian FC wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

events.title: Hibernian FC vs. Celtic FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Scottish Premiership game, scheduled for Sunday, May 3, 2026 between Hibernian FC and Celtic FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Celtic FC's position three points behind leaders Hearts in the Scottish Premiership table with four games remaining drives trader consensus at 58.5% implied probability, fueled by their strong recent form contrasting Hibernian's back-to-back losses to Hearts and Aberdeen. Hibs, sitting fifth, face a severe injury crisis with 11-12 players out including goalkeeper Raphael Sallinger, defender Felix Passlack, and midfielders Josh Mulligan and Rudi Molotnikov, plus a key defender doubtful, severely depleting their squad at Easter Road. Celtic contend with absences like Kasper Schmeichel's shoulder issue, Cameron Carter-Vickers' Achilles problem, and Julian Araujo's hamstring, yet their depth and title motivation maintain favoritism in this pivotal matchup, keeping draw (22%) and Hibs (20%) viable amid home advantage and historical competitiveness.

markets.question: Will Donald Trump visit China on May 10, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the calendar date (ET) on which U.S. President Donald Trump next visits China.

For the purpose of this market, a "visit" is defined as Trump physically entering the terrestrial or maritime territory of the listed country. Whether or not Trump enters the country's airspace during the timeframe of this market will have no bearing on a positive resolution.

The primary resolution source for this information will be official information from government of the United States of America, official information from Trump or released by his verified social media accounts (e.g. https://twitter.com/POTUS), however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

markets.question: Will Taylor Pendrith win the 2026 Cadillac Championship?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the listed player who wins the 2026 Cadillac Championship tournament.

If a listed player is eliminated from contention for the Cadillac Championship tournament based on the official rules of the tournament, the relevant market will immediately resolve to "No".

If an unlisted player wins the Cadillac Championship tournament this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by PGA Tour official tournament rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If no winner is announced by May 9, 2026 at 8:00PM ET this market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be the official results published by the PGA Tour website (https://www.pgatour.com/).

World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler lingers at 14.5% despite trailing further, buoyed by course history and signature event pedigree amid calm conditions for Round 3. markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Lucknow be 38°C on May 4?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Chaudhary Charan Singh Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 4 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chaudhary Charan Singh Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/in/lucknow/VILK.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: India Meteorological Department (IMD) short-range forecasts position trader consensus heavily toward a maximum temperature of 33°C or below in Lucknow on May 4 (86% implied probability), driven by predicted partly cloudy skies with one or two spells of rain or thundershowers, accompanied by gusty winds up to 50 kmph. Recent observations confirm a cooling trend, with May 1 recording 33.3°C (-6.1°C below normal) and May 2 at 33.6°C (-4.3°C below normal), amid 3 mm rainfall on May 1. IMD's extended outlook anticipates below-normal weekly maximums (33-36°C in central Uttar Pradesh) due to above-normal rainfall (+51% departure), suppressing daytime heating despite typical pre-monsoon patterns. Model uncertainty persists, with daily updates expected to refine land surface conditions and cloud cover impacts ahead of resolution.

markets.question: Will Meta have the #1 AI model at the end of May 2026 (Style Control On)?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on May 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

Traders eye potential Gemini refreshes or surprise GPT-5.5 drops as key risks, but Anthropic's momentum and rapid iteration cadence underpin the strong lead in this closely watched AI capability race.

markets.question: Will "Octane - Don Toliver" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

markets.question: Will ForecastEx self-certify sports event contracts by June 30, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed Designated Contract Market (DCM) self-certifies sports-related event-based contracts with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) between market creation and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The primary resolution source will be official information released by the CFTC or the respective DCM; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

events.title: Which DCMs self-certify sports event contracts by June 30?
events.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed Designated Contract Market (DCM) self-certifies sports-related event-based contracts with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) between market creation and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The primary resolution source will be official information released by the CFTC or the respective DCM; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The CFTC's March 2026 Prediction Markets Advisory provided clear guidance for designated contract markets (DCMs) to self-certify sports event contracts, stressing compliance with Core Principle 3 against manipulation risks through league partnerships, official settlement data, and pre-certification consultations. Comments on the related ANPRM closed April 30, 2026, amid debates over state gambling law preemption—bolstered by recent Third Circuit rulings affirming federal jurisdiction. CME and Kalshi have already self-certified thousands of such contracts, while MLB's MOU with the CFTC signals growing league buy-in. Traders eye potential rulemaking and additional DCM filings like LedgerX before the June 30 deadline, with no major new certifications in the past month.

markets.question: Will Donald Trump post 60-79 Truth Social posts from April 28 to May 5, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Donald Trump (@realDonaldTrump), posts on Truth Social between April 28, 12:00 PM ET and May 5, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies which are recorded on the main feed will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

The resolution source for this market is the "Post Counter" figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, Truth Social itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

Recent May 1 bursts of 10+ posts on these developments and Senate endorsements like Andy Barr's signal potential acceleration, with geopolitical escalations posing upside risk to higher bins before May 5 resolution.

Alavés' recent draw-heavy form—including 2-2 home vs. Osasuna and 3-3 at Real Sociedad—pairs with solid home record against Athletic's shaky away results, while low-scoring head-to-head history (1.94 goals average, frequent stalemates) and mutual defensive frailties (48 GA for Alavés, 45 for Athletic) foster expectations of a cagey, low-goal affair with no clear outcome favorite. No major injuries reported in the past week further balances the dynamics.

eventMetadata.context_description: Burnley and Wolverhampton Wanderers sit mathematically relegated at the foot of the Premier League table with 20 and 17 points respectively after poor campaigns marked by heavy defeats and negative goal differences of -36 and -38. The final drop spot hinges on a tight relegation battle, where Tottenham Hotspur hold 18th on 34 points (GD -10 from 34 games), trailing West Ham United's 36 points (GD -16) in 17th and Nottingham Forest's safer 39 points in 16th. West Ham's 0-3 loss to Brentford on May 2 heightens peril, risking a slide into the zone should Spurs beat Aston Villa, while recent survival form from both London clubs underscores volatility. Four fixtures remain, including Tottenham's home clash with Leeds and West Ham's testing run-in against mid-table sides, where goal difference and head-to-head results could prove decisive.

markets.question: Will OpenAI’s market cap be $1.5T or greater at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on OpenAI's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by December 31, 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on OpenAI’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors no OpenAI initial public offering by December 31, 2026 (73.5% implied probability), reflecting recent reports of internal friction between CEO Sam Altman and CFO Sarah Friar over the aggressive timeline. Friar has reportedly raised alarms about the company's readiness amid missing revenue targets, $600 billion in compute spending commitments, and profitability delayed until 2030, leading to her exclusion from key investor meetings and financial planning. A massive $122 billion funding round closed in late March at an $852 billion valuation further diminishes IPO urgency by providing ample capital for AI model development and infrastructure. High-cap outcomes like 1.5T+ (11.7%) signal optimism for trillion-dollar scale if listing occurs, but traders await S-1 filing or regulatory clarity amid competitive AI pressures from Anthropic and xAI.

markets.question: Ethereum Up or Down on May 2?
markets.description:

This market will resolve to "Down" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for ETH/USDT May 1 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is higher than the final "Close" price for the May 2 '26 12:00 ET candle.

If the final "Close" price for both of these candles is exactly equal on Binance, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (LOW) $3.75 Week of May 4 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during the week of May 4 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

(OPEN) shares closed at $5.38 on April 30, 2026, trading above the analyst consensus price target of approximately $4.80 amid anticipation for its Q1 2026 earnings release on May 7—directly within the market week. The iBuying platform's performance hinges on U.S. housing dynamics, with 30-year mortgage rates easing to 6.23% and forecasts for 8-10% inventory growth supporting potential home sales rebound. Q4 2025 results beat expectations with EPS of -$0.07 versus consensus -$0.10, boosting revenue trends, though persistent losses and competitive pressures cap upside. Traders eye earnings for contribution profit guidance and housing volume metrics, with volatility likely around the post-market report.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the closely contested 2026 Los Angeles mayoral nonpartisan primary set for June 2, trader consensus on Polymarket positions City Councilmember Nithya Raman as the frontrunner at 49.5% implied probability, propelled by her leading fundraising totals and progressive platform criticizing city "backsliding" on housing and transit, amid a UCLA Luskin poll showing 40% undecided voters and high volatility. Reality TV personality Spencer Pratt follows at 21%, boosted by recent attack ads, media buzz, and strong fundraising that has him closing on incumbent Mayor Karen Bass, who trails at 20.5% despite slim poll leads, as traders weigh her vulnerability in a fragmented field requiring a majority for outright victory or top-two advancement to a November runoff. A May 1 LA Times voter guide underscores stark candidate contrasts on homelessness and public safety.

markets.question: Will Discord’s market cap be $30B or greater at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Discord's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by June 30, 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on Discord’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices an 80.5% implied probability against a Discord IPO by June 30, 2026, reflecting the absence of a public S-1 filing four months after the company's confidential SEC submission in January 2026, which had targeted a Q1 debut with Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan as underwriters. Monetization challenges persist despite revenue doubling to around $600–800 million annually, as the gaming-centric user base resists premium uptake, compressing secondary market valuations to $7–10 billion from a 2021 peak of $15 billion. Lower-cap outcomes like under $15 billion at 18.1% capture skepticism on growth multiples amid SaaS headwinds, while high-valuation bins remain negligible. Traders eye any S-1 emergence or roadshow news as key catalysts ahead of the June deadline.

Recent results underscore this edge: Lille's string of wins, including against Lens and Nice, contrasts Le Havre's middling 14th position and poor away record, with four losses in their last six Ligue 1 road games despite a gritty 4-4 draw at Metz midweek. Le Havre's injury woes, including young defender Stephan Zagadou's season-ending cruciate ligament tear and hamstring issues for Gautier Lloris, further tilt trader consensus toward Lille, though the visitors' resilience keeps draw at 19.5% viable in a potentially tight contest.

markets.question: Will Jared Kushner attend the next US x Iran diplomatic meeting?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual attends the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify.

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not qualify as diplomatic meetings.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

Attendance refers to the listed individual being physically present and actively participating in negotiations at the meeting.

If the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran takes place over multiple days, attendance at any part of the meeting will qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the listed individual and the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: US-Iran negotiations remain stalled after President Donald Trump rejected Tehran's latest peace proposal on May 1, 2026, deeming it unsatisfactory amid disputes over Strait of Hormuz access, nuclear enrichment curbs, and regional proxy conflicts, with indirect talks continuing via Pakistani and Omani mediators. The prior major in-person diplomatic meeting in Islamabad on April 11 featured US Vice President JD Vance, Special Envoy Steve Witkoff, and advisor Jared Kushner meeting Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, but ended without agreement as delegations departed. No date or venue is confirmed for the next round before the ceasefire potentially lapses, heightening risks of escalation; traders monitor White House announcements and Iranian Foreign Ministry statements for signals on delegation makeup and scheduling.

markets.question: Will Xi Jinping purge Wang Huning in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if either of the following conditions are met by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

1) The listed individual is removed or resigns from their primary political post or from their position, if any, on the Chinese Politburo or its standing committee, with a consensus of credible reporting describing the resignation/removal as a “purge”, “ousting”, or similar language, or to have presumably or definitively occurred as a result of corruption, bribery, other criminal wrongdoing, or a lack of political favor.

2) The listed individual is expelled from the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). 

Qualifying announcements and reporting of a purge before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "Yes", regardless of when the announced resignation/removal/expulsion goes into effect.

A listed individual leaving office at the end of a regularly scheduled term, or being removed/resigning from office without a consensus of credible reporting describing the resignation/removal as a “purge”, “ousting”, or similar language, or to have presumably or definitively occurred as a result of corruption, bribery, other criminal wrongdoing, or a lack of political favor, will not qualify.

The resolution sources for this market will be information from the Chinese Government and a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping's anti-corruption campaign via the Central Commission for Discipline Inspection has accelerated in 2026, with Agriculture Minister Han Jun ousted on May 1 as the latest purge targeting his inner circle, following Politburo member Ma Xingrui's investigation in early April and the January 24 removal of top People's Liberation Army generals Zhang Youxia and Liu Zhenli, which slashed the Central Military Commission's membership. These moves prioritize absolute political loyalty in the PLA and Chinese Communist Party elite amid modernization pressures and Taiwan tensions, potentially disrupting command structures. Traders monitor CCDI probes, Two Sessions personnel announcements, and pre-2027 Party Congress shifts for resolution-defining disgrace or expulsion of high officials.

markets.question: Will MrBeast say "Insane" during his next video?
markets.description:
MrBeast releases videos on https://www.youtube.com/@MrBeast.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Mr Beast says the listed term during the next video he releases on YouTube. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

If clips of old videos or prerecorded clips are aired where people are speaking, those clips will count toward this market's resolution.

AI-generated audio or video will count toward this market's resolution.

Any usage of the term, regardless of context, will count toward the resolution of this market.

Pluralization/possessive of the term will count toward the resolution of this market; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

If no such video is posted by MrBeast by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source will be the released video from (https://www.youtube.com/@MrBeast).

Note: This market refers to MrBeast's next video posted. Shorts, previews, or other videos released other than the referenced video will not be considered.

The just-released "100 People Simulate Being Stranded In The Wilderness," following "Last To Leave Grocery Store, Wins $250,000" two weeks ago and "50 Streamers Fight for $1,000,000" last month, exemplifies this pattern with escalating rewards fueling viral engagement. events.title: FC Barcelona vs. FC Bayern München - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the UEFA Women's Champions League game, scheduled for May 3 at 10:30 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Barcelona Femení hold a commanding position in Liga F with a near-perfect 24-0-1 record, propelled by recent thumpings of Real Madrid including a 3-0 quarter-final win on March 29 to secure their UEFA Women's Champions League semi-final spot against Bayern Frauen. Bayern, unbeaten domestically this season atop the Frauen-Bundesliga save for a 7-1 group-stage drubbing by Barcelona in October 2025, advanced via a gritty 5-3 aggregate over Manchester City with late strikes from Viggósdóttir and Dallmann. First leg on April 25 in Munich favors Bayern's home crowd and revenge motive, but Barcelona's depth shines despite Aitana Bonmatí's ongoing fibula absence until early May; Bayern miss winger Klara Bühl (muscle injury). Head-to-head favors Barça (4-1-0), underscoring trader focus on aggregate dynamics, clean sheets, and Salma Paralluelo's form.

Recent tallies against Heidenheim, Mainz, and Stuttgart underscore his relentless form and Bayern Munich's title push, with 10 penalties converted and no injury reports hindering play. Trader consensus at 99.3% reflects the mathematical impossibility for challengers in the final four matchdays. Only a severe Kane injury or full rest post-title clinch, coupled with hat-trick binges from Undav or Olise, could theoretically disrupt this, though markets price such upsets as remote.

markets.question: Will Donald Trump publicly insult someone on May 9, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump makes any public statement in which he insults, mocks, or attacks any non-fictional individual personally or professionally in a clearly negative manner on the specified date (ET). Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No". 

This includes calling the individual weak, stupid, disloyal, a failure, using an insulting nickname, using other derogatory language, or using the negative form of a positive trait in a derogatory personal way (e.g., “He/She isn’t smart”). Negative forms used in reference to the individual's professional actions, policies, or decisions (e.g., “He/She isn’t being smart about this policy”) will not count. Policy disagreements stated without disparaging language will not count.

A direct reference will qualify even if the individual is not named, so long as it is reasonably clear from context that they are the subject.

Any written, verbal, or recorded public statement by Trump qualifies.

The resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy, Team Spirit's academy squad with a revamped roster since February featuring riflers VILBy, mazay, and Kiryasoo, entered Exort Series #25 Main Stage Round 1 as a higher-tier contender after mixed results in prior C-Tier events like Winline Insight. Wave Esports, HLTV-ranked #149 with recent additions like Belof and sheezy, advanced from Contenders Stage (3-1 record) but carried a 37.5% three-month win rate amid inconsistent form in qualifiers like Urban Riga Open. No roster changes or patch impacts reported pre-match; trader consensus weighed Spirit's map pool edges on Mirage and Inferno against Wave's underdog upset potential in BO3 swiss format, with no major news in the prior 48 hours.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Munich be 20°C on May 3?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Munich Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 3 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Munich Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/de/munich/EDDM.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

This setup promotes clear skies for strong solar insolation and radiative heating, with light southerly winds advecting warmer continental air masses well above the early May climatological average of 17–18°C at Munich Airport. Recent 48-hour model runs exhibit tight ensemble spreads with minimal cool biases, following yesterday's 25°C high; slim risks of increased cloudiness or northerly shear account for 15.5% odds on exactly 25°C. Deutscher Wetterdienst (DWD) observations will resolve the market, with final forecast updates expected today.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the VA-01 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the VA-01 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

eventMetadata.context_description: FIFA's recent confirmation that Iran remains in the 2026 World Cup, including group-stage matches on U.S. soil in Los Angeles and Seattle despite relocation requests to Mexico and geopolitical tensions with the U.S. and Israel, underpins the strong trader consensus on no replacement at 87.5%. President Gianni Infantino emphasized politics stays off the pitch following Iran's absence from the FIFA Congress, rejecting proposals like a Trump envoy's suggestion to swap them for Italy, which Italian officials dismissed. Iran's earlier March signals of potential withdrawal have not materialized into action, solidifying their Group G spot alongside Belgium, Egypt, and New Zealand. Realistic challenges include an official Iranian pullout over visa denials or security bans, potentially opening the slot to the next AFC qualifier like UAE or Iraq, though FIFA could opt for a three-team group instead.

markets.question: Will Encore Medical’s market cap be between $50M and $55M at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Encore Medical’s market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

As of market creation, the IPO is scheduled to price on April 22 (ET). If no such IPO occurs by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO before June 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency.

It is calculated as the total number of outstanding shares, multiplied by the official closing share price of the publicly traded class on the first trading day.

If necessary, to accurately capture the company’s total market capitalization, rather than a stock-class-specific market capitalization, the calculation will include all outstanding share classes and apply any stated conversion ratios to the publicly traded class. Where no conversion right exists, such shares will be counted at their stated outstanding amount without discount, unless official filings explicitly specify differently.

The number of outstanding shares will be determined from official company filings or disclosures (e.g., SEC filings). The closing share price on the first trading day will be determined from the primary exchange’s official listing page.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official company filings and the primary exchange’s official listing page. The market capitalization will be determined through appropriate calculation using the total outstanding shares and the closing price from the first day of trading.

In the event of an interruption in the normal trading session on the specified company’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that day as the first day of trading for the purposes of this market.

markets.question: Will Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) hit (HIGH) $435 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.MSFT%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.MSFT%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 240+ tweets from May 4 to May 6, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X from May 4 12:00 PM ET to May 6, 2026 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

This market will resolve according to the candidate who becomes the next leader of the Conservative Party of British Columbia as a result of this election.

Temporary, interim, or placeholder leaders appointed before the election will not be considered.

If the result of this election isn't known by April 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting; however, if there is any ambiguity in the results, this market will resolve according to official information from the Conservative Party of British Columbia.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus slightly favors Caroline Elliott at 39.5% over Kerry-Lynne Findlay's 37.5% in the B.C. Conservative Party leadership election, reflecting a polarized field among the final five candidates ahead of ranked-ballot voting from May 23–29 and results on May 30. Recent clashes at the April 25 Vancouver debate—Elliott accusing Findlay of whipping a "genocide" motion and sparring with Yuri Fulmer over decolonization rhetoric—intensified scrutiny without producing a breakout, while Iain Black and Peter Milobar held steady on unity and experience. Split MLA endorsements, unreliable early internal polls amid a membership surge to 42,000, and Findlay's federal credentials versus Elliott's grassroots appeal keep the race tight; late endorsements, verification completion by May 20, or turnout could tip second-preference dynamics.

Alphabet trails at 29.9% after a blockbuster Q1 2026 earnings beat on April 30, with shares surging 10% on 63% Google Cloud growth and AI monetization across search and advertising, narrowing the gap to under $300 billion amid broader Big Tech capex frenzy topping $650 billion for the year. Apple lags at 2.1% despite hovering near $4 trillion, while Tesla, Amazon, Microsoft, and non-tech Saudi Aramco face steeper hurdles from slower AI momentum; traders eye NVIDIA's May 20 earnings as the next catalyst amid volatile sentiment.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Lagos be 33°C on May 4?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Murtala Muhammad International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 4 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Murtala Muhammad International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/ng/lagos/DNMM.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Current extended forecasts from AccuWeather and NiMet indicate highs of 29–34°C (84–93°F) for early May in Lagos, with model consensus centering around 31–32°C amid the rainy season onset, where increased cloud cover and showers—projected at 88% probability on May 4 per world-weather.info—typically moderate peaks. NiMet's February 2026 seasonal climate prediction highlights warmer-than-normal temperatures and above-normal rainfall for Lagos, reflecting La Niña influences boosting tropical moisture, though historical May data at Murtala Muhammed International Airport (Ikeja) averages 31°C with rare exceedances above 33°C. Trader sentiment hinges on short-term precipitation patterns; watch NiMet daily bulletins and airport observations for resolution as models update through May 3.

markets.question: Will China GDP growth in Q2 2026 be between 4.0% and 4.3%?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to China's Y/Y Growth Rate (%) of Gross Domestic Product (GDP) in the "Preliminary Accounting Results of GDP" release for Q2 of 2026, scheduled for July 16, 2026.

The GDP release will be made available here: https://www.stats.gov.cn/english/PressRelease/

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

If no data for the specified quarter is released by the date the next quarter's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available quarter.

Note: data from the initial release of the referenced GDP report is what will be used to resolve this market. Data may be revised during the following quarter or as a part of the next estimate's publication, however any revisions to GDP report data made after the initial release will not be considered for this market's resolution.

For the full release schedule, see: https://www.stats.gov.cn/english/PressRelease/ReleaseCalendar/202512/t20251226_1962154.html
